thesis.core_idea: Leading manufacturer of diesel/gas engines benefiting from India's infrastructure push, rail capex, and emerging data center opportunities with exceptional capital efficiency and high ROE.
thesis.growth_driver: Double-digit domestic revenue growth (16% TTM), margin expansion to 20-quarter highs (38% gross margins), data center sector tailwinds (25% of power gen revenue), and infrastructure/rail capex support.
thesis.edge: Strong parent backing (51% Cummins Inc. stake), debt-free balance sheet, 29.6% ROE, 22.4% 5-year profit CAGR, best-in-class cost management, and diversified three-segment model (Engine, Power Systems, Distribution).
thesis.trigger: Analyst upgrade (Jefferies Buy at ₹4,975), infrastructure capex momentum, data center tax holiday extended to 2047, and Q3 cost controls driving operating leverage.

quality.governance_flags: No material issues; 51% promoter backing by Cummins Inc; strong board composition

capital_efficiency.roic_trend: Expanding - Q3 margins at 20-quarter highs; PBT up 7% YoY
capital_efficiency.reinvestment_quality: Excellent - capex driving capacity expansion and cost optimization with strong returns on incremental capital

structural_risks: Export uncertainty due to geopolitical volatility and tariff pressures
Competitive intensity in domestic markets limiting pricing power
Regulatory changes in emission norms requiring continuous R&D investment
cyclical_risks: Domestic economic slowdown could impact commercial vehicle and power gen segments
Commodity price volatility affecting material costs
Working capital pressure from higher receivables
company_risks: Data center pipeline is lumpy; 25% revenue concentration in this sector
Q3 profit declined 12.96% YoY despite revenue growth (cost pressures)
Market share decline from 8.82% to 7.96% over 5 years indicates competitive pressure

position_sizing.suggested_allocation: Given current portfolio weight of 7.1% vs target 9.1%, ADD 2% to close drift. Add incrementally on dips to ₹4400.
position_sizing.max_allocation: 10% (maximum position concentration given valuation premium and cyclical risks)

next_triggers: Q4 FY26 earnings (May 27, 2026) - track domestic growth trajectory and export recovery
FY27 guidance for double-digit growth confirmation
Data center revenue contribution and pipeline updates
Margin sustainability amid commodity cost pressures
Capital expenditure execution and ROI on new capacity
key_metrics: Free cash flow generation (₹1000+ Cr annually)

data_sources: Cummins India BSE/NSE official disclosures (Q3 FY26)
TickerTape, Screener.in, 5Paisa (financial data as of Mar 13-19, 2026)
Industry data from Bajaj Finserv, Kotak Neo, HDFC Securities
